title: Filtering progress bar- sub items
excerpt: Is it possible to filter progress bars on sub-items? I only want to look at certain sub items not ALL sub items of an item since i use sub items and filter them to do multiple things.

posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to filter progress bars on sub-items? I only want to look at certain sub items not ALL sub items of an item since i use sub items and filter them to do multiple things.

posts.author: FelixH (Felix)
posts.cookedHtml: I have this issue too. It would be great if you could modify the settings of that tracker/progress bar, and select the subitems it keeps track of in its progress bar.
